generated_oml:
instance RoomTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer for external room temperature monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance IncubatorTemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer for internal incubator temperature monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance IncubatorTemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer for internal incubator temperature monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RoomTemperatureSensor, IncubatorTemperatureSensor1, IncubatorTemperatureSensor2
    base:desc "Temperature data published from DS18S20 sensors to RabbitMQ server"
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    base:desc "Temperature data consumed by digital twin for model updates and control decisions"
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model for temperature prediction with parameters C_air and G_box"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonEnabler, ScipyEnabler
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model for temperature prediction with parameters C_heater, C_air, G_heater, and G_box"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonEnabler, ScipyEnabler
]

instance RabbitMQEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for exchanging temperature data between physical and virtual twins"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, SimulationService, BangBangControlService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance ScipyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Scipy optimization library for non-linear least squares calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance PythonEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python implementation language for digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, CalibrationService, MonitoringService, BangBangControlService, FaultDetectionService, CodeManagementService
]

instance GitHubRepositoryEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source GitHub repository for digital twin code and specifications"
    DTDFVocab:enables CodeManagementService
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for temperature prediction using Model A and Model B"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for calibrating thermal models using non-linear least squares optimization via Scipy"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibratedModelInsight
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for monitoring safety violations and optimality issues"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight, OptimalityIssueInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for detecting faults in system health"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]

instance BangBangControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Bang-bang control service with adjustable upper/lower temperature limits (UL, LL), heating duration (H), and waiting duration (C)"
    DTDFVocab:provides HeatbedAdjustmentAction
]

instance CodeManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for code versioning and documentation using GitHub"
    DTDFVocab:provides CodeVersionInsight
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating safety violation in thermal system operation"
]

instance OptimalityIssueInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating suboptimal operation of thermal system"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating system fault detected during operation"
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight of predicted temperature from simulation models"
]

instance CalibratedModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight of calibrated model parameters from non-linear least squares optimization"
]

instance CodeVersionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight about code version and specifications stored in GitHub repository"
]

instance HeatbedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to adjust heatbed power based on upper/lower temperature limits"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed component requiring ~4A current handled by MOSFETs"
]

instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan component operating at 12V or 24V for air circulation"
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller driving heatbed and fan via GPIO through MOSFETs and optocouplers"
]

instance PCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Custom PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for current control of heatbed and fan"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for thermal incubator system"
]

instance IncubatorContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with volume 0.03 m³"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system environment"
    base:contains IncubatorContainer, HeatbedActuator, FanActuator, RaspberryPiController, PCB, PowerSupply, RoomTemperatureSensor, IncubatorTemperatureSensor1, IncubatorTemperatureSensor2
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Controller sends commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan control) via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which translates them into hardware actuation through MOSFETs and optocouplers."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated through RabbitMQ message broker, with components including communication server, low-level driver, controller, and simulation models interacting via message passing; PT and DT communicate through RabbitMQ queues."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates during the 'as operated' phase, integrating models into the deployed physical system for monitoring and control, as stated in the introduction: 'Once the system is deployed, the models used to build it should not be discarded. Instead, they should be integrated into a Digital Twin.'"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity validated through experiments testing Assumption 1 (uniform temperature), showing discrepancies up to 7°C between sensors; Model B better predicts thermal inertia of heatbed; calibration minimizes residual error via least squares optimization."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker running on Raspberry Pi, using AMQP protocol for communication between PT (sensors, actuators) and DT components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server and DT software components deployed on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hardware, with hardware interfaces via GPIO and PCB."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Low-level driver implements a safe protocol to maintain device safety; controller uses upper/lower temperature limits (UL, LL) to prevent overheating; no explicit cybersecurity measures described."
]
